title: catesbaea holacantha
intro: Catesbaea holacantha, also known as the 'Red Stilt', is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be beneficial in treating wounds, skin conditions, and reducing fever. Catesbaea holacantha can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
